title: A New Corps
description: Lantern Corps of DC Universe in Minecraft
body:
**A New Corps** is the continuation of **Foi1y Lantern Corps**, bringing the Lantern Corps of the DC Universe into Minecraft through the Palladium mod. Building on the foundation of the original, this addon aims to expand the experience with new rings, abilities, and roleplay options while staying true to what made the first version enjoyable.



 [Original Version](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/foi1ys-lantern-corps)
 
 [Foi1y's Discord Server](https://discord.com/invite/QfPWaB7bFV)


 [Trello](https://trello.com/b/Y4vLI0mc/a-new-corps)
 
 [Our Server (Server with Stuff)](https://discord.com/invite/serverwithstuff)
